edges: User Database -> Authentication Service : userRecord (with hash) (reply)
finalCode:
sequenceDiagram(name = "UserLogin") {
    val user = lifeline(name = "User") { isActor = true }
    val loginInterface = lifeline(name = "Login Interface")
    val authService = lifeline(name = "Authentication Service")
    val userDb = lifeline(name = "User Database")
    message(from = user, to = loginInterface, label = "enterCredentials()")
    message(from = loginInterface, to = authService, label = "verifyCredentials()")
    message(from = authService, to = userDb, label = "loadUserRecord()")
    reply(from = userDb, to = authService, label = "userRecord (with hash)")
    reply(from = authService, to = loginInterface, label = "accessToken")
    reply(from = loginInterface, to = user, label = "loginSuccess")
}

@startuml
actor User
participant "Login Interface"
participant "Authentication Service"
participant "User Database"

User -> "Login Interface" : Enters credentials
"Login Interface" -> "Authentication Service" : Verify credentials
"Authentication Service" -> "User Database" : Load user record
"User Database" --> "Authentication Service" : User record with password hash
"Authentication Service" -> "Authentication Service" : Verify password hash
"Authentication Service" --> "Login Interface" : Access token
"Login Interface" --> User : Login successful
@enduml

edges: Bank Customer -> Banking App : Initiate Transfer (message)
Banking App -> Transfer Service : Submit Request (message)
Transfer Service -> Account Database : Query Balance (message)
Account Database -> Transfer Service : Current Balance (reply)
Transfer Service -> Account Database : Post Transfer (message)
Transfer Service -> Banking App : Transaction Reference (reply)
Banking App -> Bank Customer : Display Confirmation (reply)
finalCode:
sequenceDiagram(name = "BankTransfer") {
    val customer = lifeline(name = "Bank Customer") { isActor = true }
    val app = lifeline(name = "Banking App")
    val transferService = lifeline(name = "Transfer Service")
    val accountDb = lifeline(name = "Account Database")

    message(from = customer, to = app, label = "Initiate Transfer")
    message(from = app, to = transferService, label = "Submit Request")
    message(from = transferService, to = accountDb, label = "Query Balance")
    reply(from = accountDb, to = transferService, label = "Current Balance")
    message(from = transferService, to = accountDb, label = "Post Transfer")
    reply(from = accountDb, to = transferService, label = "Success")
    reply(from = transferService, to = app, label = "Transaction Reference")
    reply(from = app, to = customer, label = "Display Confirmation")
}

sequenceDiagram
  actor User
  participant "Login Interface"
  participant "Authentication Service"
  participant "User Database"
  User->>"Login Interface": Enters credentials
  "Login Interface"->>"Authentication Service": Forwards credentials for verification
  "Authentication Service"->>"User Database": Loads matching record
  "User Database"-->>"Authentication Service": User record with hash
  note right of "Authentication Service": Internally verifies password hash
  "Authentication Service"-->>"Login Interface": Access token
  "Login Interface"-->>User: Notifies of successful login

sequenceDiagram
  actor Buyer
  participant Web Shop
  participant Search Service
  participant Product Catalog
  Buyer->>Web Shop: enters search term
  Web Shop->>Search Service: search(term)
  Search Service->>Product Catalog: findProducts(term)
  Product Catalog-->>Search Service: product list
  Search Service-->>Web Shop: results list
  opt results found
    Web Shop->>Product Catalog: loadImages(product_ids)
    Product Catalog-->>Web Shop: product images
  end
  Web Shop-->>Buyer: displays results page

edges: Buyer -> Web Shop : enters search term (message)
Web Shop -> Buyer : displays results page (reply)
finalCode:
sequenceDiagram(name = "WebShopSearch") {
    val buyer = lifeline(name = "Buyer") { isActor = true }
    val webShop = lifeline(name = "Web Shop")
    val searchService = lifeline(name = "Search Service")
    val productCatalog = lifeline(name = "Product Catalog")

    message(from = buyer, to = webShop, label = "enters search term")
    message(from = webShop, to = searchService, label = "search(term)")
    message(from = searchService, to = productCatalog, label = "findProducts(term)")
    reply(from = productCatalog, to = searchService, label = "productList")
    reply(from = searchService, to = webShop, label = "resultsList")
    message(from = webShop, to = productCatalog, label = "getProductImages(productIds)")
    reply(from = productCatalog, to = webShop, label = "images")
    reply(from = webShop, to = buyer, label = "displays results page")
}

@startuml
actor Buyer
participant "Web Shop" as Shop
participant "Search Service" as Search
participant "Product Catalog" as Catalog

Buyer -> Shop : search("term")
Shop -> Search : findProducts("term")
Search -> Catalog : findByTerm("term")
Catalog --> Search : productList
Search --> Shop : productList

opt results found
    Shop -> Catalog : getImages(productList)
    Catalog --> Shop : imageList
end

Shop --> Buyer : results page
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
    actor Customer
    participant Shop
    participant CheckoutService
    participant PaymentGateway
    participant Database

    Customer->>Shop: Initiate Checkout Process
    Shop->>CheckoutService: processCheckout()
    CheckoutService->>PaymentGateway: verifyPaymentDetails()

    alt Details are valid
        PaymentGateway-->>CheckoutService: Verification OK
        CheckoutService->>Database: saveOrder()
        Database-->>CheckoutService: Order Saved

        Saga -> Warehouse : cancelReservation()

        Warehouse --> Saga : reservationCancelled
        Saga -> Log : write("ReservationCancelled")

        Saga -> Log : write("SagaCompleted: Failure")
        Saga --> "Order Service" : "Payment Failed"

else Items Not Available

end

    participant EventLog

    participant PaymentService
    participant ShipmentService

    activate OrderService
    OrderService->>SagaOrchestrator: coordinateTransaction()
    activate SagaOrchestrator

    par Reserve Items and Log
        SagaOrchestrator->>WarehouseService: reserveItems()
    and
        SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: log(reserveItems_start)
    end
    WarehouseService-->>SagaOrchestrator: availabilityResult

    alt items available
        SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: log(reserveItems_success)
        par Execute Payment and Log
            SagaOrchestrator->>PaymentService: executePayment()
        and
            SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: log(executePayment_start)
        end
        PaymentService-->>SagaOrchestrator: paymentResult

        alt payment successful
            SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: log(executePayment_success)
            par Commission Shipment and Log
                SagaOrchestrator->>ShipmentService: commissionShipment()
            and
                SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: log(commissionShipment_start)
            end
            ShipmentService-->>SagaOrchestrator: shipmentCommissioned
            SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: log(saga_completed)
            SagaOrchestrator-->>OrderService: orderSuccessful
        else payment failed
            SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: log(executePayment_failed)
            note over SagaOrchestrator, WarehouseService: Compensating Step
            par Cancel Reservation and Log
                SagaOrchestrator->>WarehouseService: cancelReservation()
            and
                SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: log(cancelReservation_start)
            end
            WarehouseService-->>SagaOrchestrator: reservationCancelled
            SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: log(saga_failed)
            SagaOrchestrator-->>OrderService: orderFailed(payment)
        end
    else items not available
        note over SagaOrchestrator: Abort Transaction
        SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: log(reserveItems_failed)
        SagaOrchestrator->>EventLog: log(saga_aborted)
        SagaOrchestrator-->>OrderService: orderFailed(unavailable)
    end
    deactivate SagaOrchestrator
    OrderService-->>Customer: orderStatus
    deactivate OrderService

sysml2Model(name = "EarthObservationSatellite") {

    // Structure and Thermal Components
    val primaryStructure = partDef(name = "Primary Structure")
    val solarPanels = partDef(name = "Solar Panels")
    val heatShield = partDef(name = "Heat Shield")

    // Electrical Power Supply Components
    val batteryArray = partDef(name = "Battery Array")
    val solarPowerRegulator = partDef(name = "Solar Power Regulator")
    val pdu = partDef(name = "PDU")

    // AOCS Components
    val starSensor = partDef(name = "Star Sensor")
    val reactionWheels = partDef(name = "Reaction Wheels")
    val thrusters = partDef(name = "Thrusters")

    // TT&C Components
    val onBoardComputer = partDef(name = "On-Board Computer")
    val rfTransmitter = partDef(name = "RF Transmitter")
    val rfReceiver = partDef(name = "RF Receiver")

    // Subsystem Definitions
    val payloadSubsystem = partDef(name = "Payload Subsystem") {
        part(name = "camera", typeId = opticalCamera.id)
        part(name = "radar", typeId = sarRadar.id)
    }

    val structureAndThermalControl = partDef(name = "Structure and Thermal Control") {
        part(name = "structure", typeId = primaryStructure.id)
        part(name = "panels", typeId = solarPanels.id)
        part(name = "shield", typeId = heatShield.id)
    }

    val electricalPowerSupply = partDef(name = "Electrical Power Supply") {
        part(name = "battery", typeId = batteryArray.id)
        part(name = "regulator", typeId = solarPowerRegulator.id)
        part(name = "pdu", typeId = pdu.id)
    }

    val aocs = partDef(name = "Attitude and Orbit Control System") {
        part(name = "sensor", typeId = starSensor.id)
        part(name = "wheels", typeId = reactionWheels.id)
        part(name = "thrusters", typeId = thrusters.id)
    }

    val ttAndC = partDef(name = "Telemetry, Tracking & Command") {
        part(name = "obc", typeId = onBoardComputer.id)
        part(name = "transmitter", typeId = rfTransmitter.id)
        part(name = "receiver", typeId = rfReceiver.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "Earth Observation Satellite BDD") {
        include(payloadSubsystem)
        include(structureAndThermalControl)
        include(electricalPowerSupply)
        include(aocs)
        include(ttAndC)
        include(payloadInstrument)
        include(opticalCamera)
        include(sarRadar)
        include(primaryStructure)
        include(solarPanels)
        include(heatShield)
        include(batteryArray)
        include(solarPowerRegulator)
        include(pdu)
        include(starSensor)
        include(reactionWheels)
        include(thrusters)
        include(onBoardComputer)
        include(rfTransmitter)
        include(rfReceiver)
    }
}

Emergency Braking Assistant -> Brake Control Unit : adjustBrakePressure() [repeatedly] (message)
Emergency Braking Assistant -> Brake Control Unit : endBraking() (message)
Emergency Braking Assistant -> Diagnostic Log : recordEvent(MANEUVER_COMPLETE) (message)
Emergency Braking Assistant -> Driver : [TTC >= threshold] distanceWarning() (message)
Emergency Braking Assistant -> Diagnostic Log : logRisk(OBSERVED) (message)
finalCode:
sequenceDiagram(name = "EmergencyBrakingSystem") {
    val camera = lifeline(name = "Camera")
    val radar = lifeline(name = "Radar")
    val fusionUnit = lifeline(name = "Fusion Unit")
    val eba = lifeline(name = "Emergency Braking Assistant")
    val driver = lifeline(name = "Driver") { isActor = true }
    val brakeControlUnit = lifeline(name = "Brake Control Unit")
    val diagnosticLog = lifeline(name = "Diagnostic Log")

    message(from = camera, to = fusionUnit, label = "measurementData")
    message(from = radar, to = fusionUnit, label = "measurementData")
    message(from = fusionUnit, to = eba, label = "collisionRisk(timeToCollision)")
    message(from = eba, to = driver, label = "[TTC < threshold] acousticWarning()")
    message(from = eba, to = brakeControlUnit, label = "initiateBraking()")
    message(from = eba, to = brakeControlUnit, label = "adjustBrakePressure() [repeatedly]")
    message(from = eba, to = brakeControlUnit, label = "endBraking()")
    message(from = eba, to = diagnosticLog, label = "recordEvent(MANEUVER_COMPLETE)")
    message(from = eba, to = driver, label = "[TTC >= threshold] distanceWarning()")
    message(from = eba, to = diagnosticLog, label = "logRisk(OBSERVED)")
}
